claims.statement: Every reported agent action or tool invocation is linked to a visible trajectory record.
Every reported environment or tool output is linked to a visible trajectory record.
The adapter does not promote inferred dependencies, hidden reasoning, or external truth into observed evidence.
An ordinary trajectory without an independent completeness guarantee remains semantically incomplete.
The pre-outcome FAR result is deterministic across two clean executions.
The primary FAR result and its hashes are frozen before benchmark outcome fields are revealed.
